zh.title: 艾达币/美元技术分析：短线震荡偏强
zh.content:
当前ADA/USD维持窄幅震荡上行，最新价运行于0.2439附近，价格稳站20日均线之上，说明短线买盘仍具一定优势。24小时涨幅虽有限，但低点持续抬高，市场情绪偏向谨慎乐观。

从技术指标观察，MACD仍处于零轴下方，且柱体略显疲弱，代表中期空头动能尚未完全消退。不过价格能够维持在SMA20均线0.2414上方，意味着短线趋势开始向多头倾斜，后续需关注量能配合。

关键支撑位首先位于0.2424区域，其次是0.2400整数关口，一旦跌破可能重新测试前期低位。上方阻力集中在0.2442至0.2460区间，若有效突破，短线有机会进一步挑战0.2500心理压力位。

操作策略方面，短线交易者可考虑依托0.2420附近轻仓低吸，并以跌破0.2400作为风控参考。激进型投资者可等待突破0.2445后顺势跟进，但由于MACD尚未形成明显金叉，追高仍需控制仓位。

en.title: Cardano vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Cardano is showing a modest recovery pattern after stabilizing above the 0.2420 area, with ADA/USD currently trading near 0.2439. The price remains slightly above the 20-day simple moving average at 0.2415, suggesting short-term bullish momentum is beginning to build. However, gains remain limited as buyers have not yet produced a decisive breakout above the recent intraday high near 0.2442. The narrow trading range also indicates that the market is waiting for stronger directional confirmation before establishing a sustained trend.

Momentum indicators present a cautiously mixed outlook. The MACD remains in negative territory at -0.00116, which signals that bearish pressure has not completely faded despite the recent price stabilization. At the same time, the improving price structure relative to the SMA(20) hints that downside momentum is weakening. Although RSI data is unavailable, current price behavior suggests neutral-to-slightly bullish sentiment, especially if ADA can continue closing above the moving average during upcoming sessions.

From a technical perspective, immediate support is positioned around 0.2425, aligning closely with the session low. A break below this zone could expose ADA to additional weakness toward the 0.2400 psychological level. On the upside, resistance is developing near 0.2442, followed by a stronger barrier around 0.2460 where previous selling pressure may emerge. Sustained movement above resistance would improve the short-term outlook and potentially trigger additional buying activity from momentum traders.

Traders may consider a cautious bullish strategy while ADA remains above the 0.2415–0.2420 support region. Short-term buyers could look for confirmation through increased volume and a clean breakout above 0.2442 before expanding positions. Conservative participants may prefer waiting for MACD improvement before entering aggressively. Meanwhile, a drop below support would weaken the current recovery structure and favor defensive positioning or tighter stop-loss management in the near term.
